cards.name: 4 of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: possessiveness, insecurity, hoarding, stinginess, stability, security, savings, materialism, wealth, frugality, boundaries, guardedness

cards.name: 6 of Swords, reversed
cards.interpretation: stuck in past, returning to trouble, running away from problems, trapped

cards.name: ⅩⅩ Judgement, reversed
cards.interpretation: self-doubt, lack of self-awareness, failure to learn lessons, self-loathing
